title: Dark Iron Tools and Armor
description: This texture pack changes your normal iron from the game, for a darker one so that it fits better with the environment
body:
# Dark Iron ⛏️
This texture pack changes your normal iron from the game, for a darker one so that it fits better with the environment

the changes it makes:
- iron armor
- iron tools

![In game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f24b56d5feb206c5aba47824d4f1e620b7af2f55.png)
